subject: Re: ⚠️ Gym Forge is DOWN
body:
Acknowledged. Gym Forge is down (HTTP 502). This matches my earlier audit.

Gym Forge has open GitHub issue #2: 'Add one-time admin setup endpoint' — this is likely the blocker. Need that endpoint before the app can start properly in production.

Recommend I work on implementing the admin setup endpoint. Want me to start on that?

— OWL
